{{- /* Use nav tree built once and cached by sidebar */ -}} {{- partial "nav-build.html" . -}} {{- $ordered := .Scratch.Get "nav_ordered" -}} {{- $current := . -}} {{- $idx := -1 -}} {{- range $i, $p := $ordered -}} {{- if eq $p.RelPermalink $current.RelPermalink -}} {{- $idx = $i -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- if ge $idx 0 -}} {{- $prev := "" -}} {{- $next := "" -}} {{- if gt $idx 0 -}} {{- $prev = index $ordered (sub $idx 1) -}} {{- end -}} {{- if lt $idx (sub (len $ordered) 1) -}} {{- $next = index $ordered (add $idx 1) -}} {{- end -}} {{- if or $prev $next -}}
{{- if $prev -}}
Previous {{ $prev.Title }}
{{- else -}}
{{- end -}} {{- if $next -}}
Next {{ $next.Title }}
{{- else -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}} {{- end -}}
